---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve SnapFlow
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run command '...'
2. With configuration '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- SnapFlow Version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- Python Version: [e.g., 3.11.0]
- Operating System: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13, Windows 11]
- Database: [e.g., PostgreSQL 15.2]
- Database Driver: [e.g., psycopg2-binary 2.9.6]

## Configuration
```yaml
# Your snapflow.yaml (remove sensitive information)
project_name: 'myproject'
tracked_databases: ['mydb']
url: 'postgresql://localhost:5432/'
```

## Error Message
```
Paste the complete error message and stack trace here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (screenshots, logs, etc.).

## Possible Solution
If you have ideas on how to fix this, please share.
